outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low-Moderate: Positive total GEX (1.66B) suppresses volatility. Bearish smirk skew (1.82) indicates persistent put hedging demand.
outlook.summary: Market compressed in positive gamma zone between 0DTE Gamma Flip (24118) and RESONANCE Call Wall (24300). Heavy call volume near spot (Vol/OI >20x) suggests breakout attempts. Monthly Max Pain at 24100 provides downward magnetic pull. Expect contained price action with dealer-suppressed volatility.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Dominant Call OI across ALL expiries (0DTE: 265, WEEKLY: 201, MONTHLY: 410). High Vol/OI (3.94x) confirms active trading. Primary upside cap.
Monthly Max Pain with 231 Call OI. Strong magnetic pull for options expiration. Only 0.55% below spot - primary price target.
Massive Monthly Put OI (597) establishing structural support. Near Gamma Flip confluence strengthens level.
0DTE Gamma Flip boundary. Spot above = positive gamma zone, dealers suppress volatility and support prices.
CONFLUENCE: Put OI in WEEKLY (28) + MONTHLY (264). Also WEEKLY Max Pain. High Vol/OI (21x) confirms active hedging.
CONFLUENCE: Put OI in 0DTE (103) + WEEKLY (209). Secondary structural support below main zone.
Mixed OI near spot: 0DTE Call (55, Vol 1269) + MONTHLY Put (150). Extreme Vol/OI (23x) creates dealer hedging friction.
